message:
🐛 fix tileFontSize hoisting and tile mount reliability (#48)

- Move tileCols/tileRows/tileFontSize declarations above tileRefCallback
  to fix 'Cannot access before initialization' ReferenceError
- Replace ref-callback-based tile mounting with useEffect-based approach:
  ref callback now only stores DOM elements, useEffect handles mounting
  after React commit + browser paint, fixing 3-clicks-to-tile bug
- Consolidate tile refit effect into the mount effect

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
